name: powerbi-markdown-viewer
description: Render Markdown content with syntax highlighting and emoji support in Power BI reports

scripts.package: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path 'dist') { Get-ChildItem 'dist\*.pbiviz' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force }" && pbiviz package --certification-audit && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$files = @(Get-ChildItem 'dist\*.pbiviz' -File); if ($files.Count -ne 1) { throw \"Expected exactly one generated .pbiviz file; found $($files.Count)\" }; Rename-Item -LiteralPath $files[0].FullName -NewName 'atlynMarkdownViewer.pbiviz' -Force"
